metadata.description: Spyder — HUD-style Jarvis UI skills for React and Blazor (.NET)

plugins.name: jarvis-ui-react
plugins.description: JARVIS UI React — HUD-style sci-fi React component library with 50+ components (JButton, JModal, JTable, JNodeGraph, JRadialMenu, JCommandPalette, JGaugeChart, JBootScreen...)

plugins.name: jarvis-ui-blazor
plugins.description: JARVIS UI Blazor — cinematic HUD-style Blazor (.NET/C#/Razor) component library with 57+ components (JButton, JModal, JTable, JLeafletMap, JGoogleMap, JNodeGraph, JRadialMenu...)
